name: org-memory
description: Agent-memory extension for org-cli: persists agent knowledge and daily notes to an org workspace, overriding memory-wiki.

orgBin.description: Path to the org binary (shared with org-cli via ORG_CLI_BIN)

inboxFile.description: Filename for new agent captures (relative to dir)

dir.label: Agent Workspace Directory
dir.help: Where the agent keeps its own org files (memory.org, daily notes, tasks).

roamDir.label: Agent Roam Directory
roamDir.help: Where the agent's knowledge-graph nodes live. Defaults to <dir>/roam.

db.label: Agent Database
db.help: SQLite database for the agent's roam + index. Defaults to <dir>/.org.db.

orgBin.label: org CLI Binary
orgBin.help: Path to the org binary. Shares ORG_CLI_BIN with the org-cli plugin.
